title: vitis vinifera var. sylvestris
intro: Vitis vinifera var. sylvestris, also known as the wild grapevine, is a subspecies of the common grapevine native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Vitis vinifera var. sylvestris include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting the digestive system. Herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, wines, and other medicinal products.
